preconditions: I can only register a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the patient encounter A is registered and it is not the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I register a patient encounter A, it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered

reserve_provisional_bed.description: reserve provisional bed for a patient encounter A in a bed resource B
preconditions: I can only reserve provisional bed for a patient encounter A in a bed resource B if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and a bed is available for B and the bed is compatible for A in B
I can only reserve provisional bed for a patient encounter A in a bed resource B if it is not the case that A has a provisional bed
effects: Once I reserve provisional bed for a patient encounter A in a bed resource B, it is the case that a bed is reserved for A in B and A has a provisional bed
Once I reserve provisional bed for a patient encounter A in a bed resource B, it is not the case anymore that a bed is available for B

release_provisional_bed.description: release provisional bed for a patient encounter A from a bed resource B
preconditions: I can only release provisional bed for a patient encounter A from a bed resource B if it is the case that a bed is reserved for A in B

I can only release provisional bed for a patient encounter A from a bed resource B if it is not the case that the treatment area is confirmed for A and it is not the case that the care team is allocated for A
effects: Once I release provisional bed for a patient encounter A from a bed resource B, it is the case that a bed is available for B

Once I release provisional bed for a patient encounter A from a bed resource B, it is not the case anymore that a bed is reserved for A in B and it is not the case anymore that A has a provisional bed and it is not the case anymore that A has staff assigned and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for treatment and it is not the case anymore that a consultation is assigned for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for equipment allocation and it is not the case anymore that resource check flag for A

allocate_support_equipment.description: allocate support equipment a support equipment B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only allocate support equipment a support equipment B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and the equipment B is available
effects: Once I allocate support equipment a support equipment B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that equipment is allocated to A in B
Once I allocate support equipment a support equipment B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the equipment B is available

return_support_equipment.description: return support equipment a support equipment B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only return support equipment a support equipment B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that equipment is allocated to A in B
effects: Once I return support equipment a support equipment B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the equipment B is available
Once I return support equipment a support equipment B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that equipment is allocated to A in B

confirm_equipment_assignment.description: confirm equipment assignment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B
preconditions: I can only confirm equipment assignment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and A has a provisional bed and equipment is allocated to A in B
I can only confirm equipment assignment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B if it is not the case that A has staff assigned
effects: Once I confirm equipment assignment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B, it is the case that A has staff assigned

assign_consultation_slot_to_patient.description: assign consultation slot a consultation slot B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign consultation slot a consultation slot B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and A has a provisional bed and the consultation slot B is available
I can only assign consultation slot a consultation slot B to a patient encounter A if it is not the case that A has staff assigned
effects: Once I assign consultation slot a consultation slot B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that A has staff assigned and a consultation is assigned for A
Once I assign consultation slot a consultation slot B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the consultation slot B is available

confirm_specialist_and_equipment.description: confirm a specialist staff C and a support equipment B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only confirm a specialist staff C and a support equipment B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that A has staff assigned and A has a provisional bed and equipment is allocated to A in B and the specialist staff C is available
I can only confirm a specialist staff C and a support equipment B for a patient encounter A if it is not the case that A is ready for treatment
effects: Once I confirm a specialist staff C and a support equipment B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that A is ready for treatment
Once I confirm a specialist staff C and a support equipment B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that a consultation is assigned for A

bind_protocol_to_patient.description: bind a care protocol B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only bind a care protocol B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that A has a provisional bed and the patient protocol is bound to A for B
I can only bind a care protocol B to a patient encounter A if it is not the case that A is ready for treatment
effects: Once I bind a care protocol B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that A is ready for treatment
Once I bind a care protocol B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that a consultation is assigned for A

reserve_medical_device.description: reserve a medical device B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medical device B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and a device is available for B and the device is compatible for A in B
effects: Once I reserve a medical device B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that device reserved for A B
Once I reserve a medical device B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that a device is available for B

release_medical_device.description: release a medical device B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a medical device B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that device reserved for A B
effects: Once I release a medical device B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that a device is available for B
Once I release a medical device B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that device reserved for A B

reserve_clinical_staff_for_patient.description: reserve a clinical staff B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical staff B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and staff is available for B and the staff is compatible for A in B
effects: Once I reserve a clinical staff B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that staff is assigned to A during B
Once I reserve a clinical staff B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that staff is available for B

release_clinical_staff_for_patient.description: release a clinical staff B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical staff B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that staff is assigned to A during B
effects: Once I release a clinical staff B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that staff is available for B
Once I release a clinical staff B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that staff is assigned to A during B

reserve_procedure_room.description: reserve a procedure room B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a procedure room B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and the procedure room B is available and the procedure room is compatible for A in B
effects: Once I reserve a procedure room B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the procedure room is reserved for A during B
Once I reserve a procedure room B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the procedure room B is available

release_procedure_room.description: release a procedure room B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a procedure room B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that the procedure room is reserved for A during B
effects: Once I release a procedure room B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the procedure room B is available
Once I release a procedure room B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the procedure room is reserved for A during B

reserve_medication_set.description: reserve a medication set B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medication set B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and the medication set B is available and the medication is compatible for A in B
effects: Once I reserve a medication set B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the medication is reserved for A during B
Once I reserve a medication set B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the medication set B is available

release_medication_set.description: release a medication set B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a medication set B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that the medication is reserved for A during B
effects: Once I release a medication set B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the medication set B is available
Once I release a medication set B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the medication is reserved for A during B

assign_treatment_area_and_initialize.description: assign and initialize a treatment area B for a patient encounter A with a medical device C and a clinical staff D
preconditions: I can only assign and initialize a treatment area B for a patient encounter A with a medical device C and a clinical staff D if it is the case that A has a provisional bed and device reserved for A C and staff is assigned to A during D and a treatment area is available for B and the treatment area is compatible for A in B
I can only assign and initialize a treatment area B for a patient encounter A with a medical device C and a clinical staff D if it is not the case that the treatment area is confirmed for A
effects: Once I assign and initialize a treatment area B for a patient encounter A with a medical device C and a clinical staff D, it is the case that the treatment area is assigned to A during B and the treatment area is confirmed for A
Once I assign and initialize a treatment area B for a patient encounter A with a medical device C and a clinical staff D, it is not the case anymore that a treatment area is available for B

assign_treatment_area_with_resources.description: assign a treatment area B with a procedure room C and a diagnostic resource D for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign a treatment area B with a procedure room C and a diagnostic resource D for a patient encounter A if it is the case that A has a provisional bed and the procedure room is reserved for A during C and the diagnostic resource D is available and a treatment area is available for B and the treatment area is compatible for A in B and the diagnostic is compatible for A in D
I can only assign a treatment area B with a procedure room C and a diagnostic resource D for a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the treatment area is confirmed for A
effects: Once I assign a treatment area B with a procedure room C and a diagnostic resource D for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the treatment area is assigned to A during B and the treatment area is confirmed for A and resource check flag for A and a consultation is assigned for A

Once I assign a treatment area B with a procedure room C and a diagnostic resource D for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that a treatment area is available for B and it is not the case anymore that the diagnostic resource D is available

acknowledge_treatment_area_readiness.description: acknowledge readiness of treatment area for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C
preconditions: I can only acknowledge readiness of treatment area for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C if it is the case that the treatment area is confirmed for A and resource check flag for A and device reserved for A B and staff is assigned to A during C
effects: Once I acknowledge readiness of treatment area for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C, it is not the case anymore that resource check flag for A and it is not the case anymore that a consultation is assigned for A

allocate_care_team.description: allocate care team for a patient encounter A with a medical device B, a clinical staff C, and a nurse team D
preconditions: I can only allocate care team for a patient encounter A with a medical device B, a clinical staff C, and a nurse team D if it is the case that A is ready for treatment and the treatment area is confirmed for A and device reserved for A B and staff is assigned to A during C and A has the attribute D

I can only allocate care team for a patient encounter A with a medical device B, a clinical staff C, and a nurse team D if it is not the case that a consultation is assigned for A and it is not the case that the care team is allocated for A
effects: Once I allocate care team for a patient encounter A with a medical device B, a clinical staff C, and a nurse team D, it is the case that the care team is allocated for A

allocate_physician_team.description: allocate physician team for a patient encounter A with a procedure room B, a medication set C, and a physician team D
preconditions: I can only allocate physician team for a patient encounter A with a procedure room B, a medication set C, and a physician team D if it is the case that A is ready for treatment and the treatment area is confirmed for A and the procedure room is reserved for A during B and the medication is reserved for A during C and A has the attribute D
I can only allocate physician team for a patient encounter A with a procedure room B, a medication set C, and a physician team D if it is not the case that the care team is allocated for A
effects: Once I allocate physician team for a patient encounter A with a procedure room B, a medication set C, and a physician team D, it is the case that the care team is allocated for A and a consultation is assigned for A

finalize_phase_transition.description: finalize phase transition for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C
preconditions: I can only finalize phase transition for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C if it is the case that the care team is allocated for A and a consultation is assigned for A and device reserved for A B and staff is assigned to A during C
effects: Once I finalize phase transition for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C, it is the case that A is ready for equipment allocation

Once I finalize phase transition for a patient encounter A with a medical device B and a clinical staff C, it is not the case anymore that a consultation is assigned for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for treatment and it is not the case anymore that resource check flag for A

confirm_support_equipment_with_specialis.description: confirm support equipment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B and a specialist staff C
preconditions: I can only confirm support equipment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B and a specialist staff C if it is the case that A is ready for equipment allocation and the care team is allocated for A and A has a provisional bed and equipment is allocated to A in B and the specialist staff C is available
I can only confirm support equipment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B and a specialist staff C if it is not the case that A is ready for treatment
effects: Once I confirm support equipment for a patient encounter A with a support equipment B and a specialist staff C, it is the case that A is ready for treatment

verify_support_equipment.description: verify support equipment a support equipment B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only verify support equipment a support equipment B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the care team is allocated for A and A is ready for treatment and equipment is allocated to A in B

I can only verify support equipment a support equipment B for a patient encounter A if it is not the case that a consultation is assigned for A and it is not the case that the support equipment is verified for A
effects: Once I verify support equipment a support equipment B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the support equipment is verified for A

reserve_consultation_slot.description: reserve consultation slot a consultation slot B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve consultation slot a consultation slot B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the care team is allocated for A and A is ready for treatment and the consultation slot B is available

I can only reserve consultation slot a consultation slot B for a patient encounter A if it is not the case that a consultation is assigned for A and it is not the case that the support equipment is verified for A
effects: Once I reserve consultation slot a consultation slot B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the support equipment is verified for A
Once I reserve consultation slot a consultation slot B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the consultation slot B is available

reserve_protocol_for_group.description: reserve protocol a care protocol B for group a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve protocol a care protocol B for group a patient encounter A if it is the case that the support equipment is verified for A and the care protocol B is available and protocol is compatible with A for B
effects: Once I reserve protocol a care protocol B for group a patient encounter A, it is the case that the protocol is applicable to the group A for B
Once I reserve protocol a care protocol B for group a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the care protocol B is available

bind_group_protocol_compatibility.description: bind group protocol compatibility for a patient group b A with a care protocol C using a patient group a patient group a B
preconditions: I can only bind group protocol compatibility for a patient group b A with a care protocol C using a patient group a patient group a B if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and A is in triage category b and the protocol is applicable to A for C and the protocol is applicable to the group B for C

I can only bind group protocol compatibility for a patient group b A with a care protocol C using a patient group a patient group a B if it is not the case that the patient protocol is bound to A for C
effects: Once I bind group protocol compatibility for a patient group b A with a care protocol C using a patient group a patient group a B, it is the case that the patient protocol is bound to A for C

confirm_specialist_consult.description: confirm specialist consult for a patient encounter A with a specialist staff C using a support equipment B
preconditions: I can only confirm specialist consult for a patient encounter A with a specialist staff C using a support equipment B if it is the case that the patient encounter A is registered and A is in triage category b and A is ready for treatment and the support equipment is verified for A and equipment is allocated to A in B and the specialist staff C is available
I can only confirm specialist consult for a patient encounter A with a specialist staff C using a support equipment B if it is not the case that the specialist consult is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm specialist consult for a patient encounter A with a specialist staff C using a support equipment B, it is the case that the specialist consult is confirmed for A

confirm_final_assignment_priority_a.description: confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with priority a
preconditions: I can only confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with priority a if it is the case that A is in triage category a and the patient encounter A is registered and A has a provisional bed and the treatment area is confirmed for A and the care team is allocated for A and the support equipment is verified for A and A is ready for treatment
I can only confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with priority a if it is not the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with priority a, it is the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A

confirm_final_assignment_with_protocol.description: confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with protocol a care protocol B
preconditions: I can only confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with protocol a care protocol B if it is the case that A is in triage category b and the patient encounter A is registered and A has a provisional bed and the treatment area is confirmed for A and the care team is allocated for A and the support equipment is verified for A and A is ready for treatment and the patient protocol is bound to A for B
I can only confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with protocol a care protocol B if it is not the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with protocol a care protocol B, it is the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A

confirm_final_assignment_with_specialist.description: confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with specialist consult
preconditions: I can only confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with specialist consult if it is the case that A is in triage category b and the patient encounter A is registered and A has a provisional bed and the treatment area is confirmed for A and the care team is allocated for A and the support equipment is verified for A and A is ready for treatment and the specialist consult is confirmed for A
I can only confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with specialist consult if it is not the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm final assignment for a patient encounter A with specialist consult, it is the case that the final assignment is confirmed for A

action_nl_templates.reserve_provisional_bed: reserve provisional bed for patient encounter {?patient_encounter} in bed resource {?resource_slot}

action_nl_templates.release_medical_device: release medical device {?resource_slot} from patient encounter {?patient_encounter}

action_nl_templates.release_clinical_staff_for_patient: release clinical staff {?resource_slot} from patient encounter {?patient_encounter}

action_nl_templates.release_procedure_room: release procedure room {?resource_slot} from patient encounter {?patient_encounter}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a patient encounter or a bed resource or a treatment area or a clinical staff or a medical device or a procedure room or a support equipment or a consultation slot or a care protocol or a specialist staff or a diagnostic resource or a medication set or a care attribute is also a object
Everything that is a nurse team or a physician team is also a care attribute
Everything that is a patient group a or a patient group b is also a patient encounter
